_meta.notes: The Marginal — an orcish scholar of seventy-something who has commissioned the cantor's distillation. They have written one of the eight layers of marginalia in the folio in question. They want the centuries-long argument distilled into a single verse the choir can carry. Non-recurring; bound to the-distilled-verse beat-pack.

tagline: orcish scholar, ink-stained at the right hand only, one of the argument's authors.
